content.json:
# SQL Server Monitoring Dashboard
> Migrated from System Center Operations Manager – Microsoft SQL Server Management Pack

This workbook replicates SCOM health views for SQL Server on Windows. Use the parameters below to filter by time range and computer.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.label: SQL Server Host
parameters.query: Perf | where ObjectName startswith "SQLServer:" | summarize by Computer | sort by Computer asc

content.json:
## 🖥️ Service Health Overview
_Replicates SCOM: SQL Server Windows Service, SQL Agent Service, SSIS Service monitors_

content.query:
SQLMonitoring_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ScriptName == "Test-SQLServiceHealth"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| extend ServiceCategory = extract(@"ServiceCategory=([^,\r\n]+)", 1, RawData)
| extend ServiceName = extract(@"ServiceName=([^,\r\n]+)", 1, RawData)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, InstanceName, ServiceCategory
| extend HealthIcon = iff(Status == "Running", "✅", "❌")
| project Computer, InstanceName, ServiceCategory, ServiceName, State = Status, HealthIcon, LastChecked = TimeGenerated
| sort by Computer, ServiceCategory asc
content.title: SQL Server Service States

content.json:
## 📊 Performance – DB Engine
_Replicates SCOM: CPU Utilization, Buffer Cache Hit Ratio, SQL Compilations, Batch Requests_

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "Process" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName =~ "sqlservr"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: SQL Server CPU Utilization (%)

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "SQLServer:Buffer Manager" and CounterName == "Buffer cache hit ratio"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize AvgRatio = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Buffer Cache Hit Ratio (%) – threshold: 90%

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "SQLServer:SQL Statistics"
| where CounterName in ("Batch Requests/sec", "SQL Compilations/sec", "SQL Re-Compilations/sec")
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize AvgValue = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, CounterName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: SQL Statistics (Batch Requests / Compilations per sec)

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "SQLServer:Memory Manager"
| where CounterName in ("Total Server Memory (KB)", "Target Server Memory (KB)")
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize AvgMem = avg(CounterValue / 1024) by Computer, CounterName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: SQL Server Memory Usage (MB)

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "SQLServer:Locks" and CounterName == "Number of Deadlocks/sec"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize TotalDeadlocks = sum(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Deadlocks per Hour

content.json:
## 🗄️ Database Status
_Replicates SCOM: Database Status, Backup Status, Log Backup Status monitors_

content.query:
SQLMonitoring_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ScriptName == "Test-SQLDatabaseHealth"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, InstanceName, DatabaseName
| project Computer, InstanceName, DatabaseName, Status, CheckResult, Message, TimeGenerated
| sort by Computer, DatabaseName asc
content.title: Database Health Status

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "SQLServer:Databases"
| where CounterName == "Percent Log Used"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize AvgLogUsed = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, InstanceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| where AvgLogUsed > 50
| sort by AvgLogUsed desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Databases by Log Space Used (%) – >50%

content.json:
## 🔄 Availability Groups
_Replicates SCOM: AG Data Synchronization, Replica Role, Automatic Failover monitors_

content.query:
SQLMonitoring_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ScriptName == "Test-SQLAvailabilityGroup"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, InstanceName, DatabaseName
| project Computer, InstanceName, DatabaseName, Status, CheckResult, Message, TimeGenerated
| sort by Computer, DatabaseName asc
content.title: Availability Group Replica Status

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "SQLServer:Database Replica" and CounterName == "Transaction Delay"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize AvgDelay = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, InstanceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: AG Transaction Delay (ms) per Replica

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ObjectName == "SQLServer:Database Replica" and CounterName == "Recovery Queue"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize AvgQueue = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, InstanceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: AG Recovery Queue (KB) per Replica

content.json:
## 🤖 SQL Agent Jobs
_Replicates SCOM: Last Run Status, Agent Job Duration monitors_

content.query:
SQLMonitoring_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ScriptName == "Test-SQLAgentJobStatus"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, InstanceName, JobName
| project Computer, InstanceName, JobName, Status, Message, MetricValue, TimeGenerated
| sort by Status asc, Computer, JobName asc
content.title: SQL Agent Job Last Run Status

content.query:
SQLMonitoring_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ScriptName == "Test-SQLAgentJobStatus" and Status == "Failed"
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, InstanceName, JobName, Message
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent Agent Job Failures

content.json:
## 🚨 Windows Event Log — SQL Server
_Replicates SCOM event-based rules: service state changes, I/O errors, DBCC errors, login failures, AG role changes, Agent connectivity, fatal errors_

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "Service Control Manager"
| where EventID in (7036, 7034, 7031)
| extend ServiceName = extract(@"The (.+?) service", 1, RenderedDescription)
| extend NewState   = extract(@"(entered the running state|entered the stopped state|terminated unexpectedly)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| extend StateIcon  = case(
    NewState has "running",              "✅ Running",
    NewState has "stopped",              "🔴 Stopped",
    NewState has "terminated",           "💥 Crashed",
    "⚠️ Unknown")
| where ServiceName has_any ("MSSQLSERVER", "SQLSERVERAGENT", "MsDtsServer", "SQL Server", "SQL Full-text")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, ServiceName, StateIcon, RenderedDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: 🔄 SQL Service State Changes (SCM — EventID 7036 / 7034 / 7031)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "MSSQLSERVER"
| where EventID in (823, 824, 825, 832, 833, 9001, 9002)
| extend EventMeaning = case(
    EventID == 823, "I/O read error",
    EventID == 824, "I/O logical consistency error",
    EventID == 825, "I/O read retry",
    EventID == 832, "Constant page changed",
    EventID == 833, "I/O requests taking >15s",
    EventID == 9001, "Log not available",
    EventID == 9002, "Transaction log full",
    "Other")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, EventMeaning, RenderedDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: 💾 I/O & Storage Errors (EventID 823/824/825/832/833/9001/9002)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "MSSQLSERVER"
| where EventID in (2570, 2601, 2627, 8928, 8929, 8930, 8964, 8965, 8966)
| extend ErrorType = case(
    EventID == 2570, "Column value out of range",
    EventID in (2601, 2627), "Constraint violation",
    EventID between (8928 .. 8930), "Extent error",
    EventID between (8964 .. 8966), "Object page error",
    "DBCC error")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, ErrorType, RenderedDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: 🔍 DBCC / Database Consistency Errors

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "MSSQLSERVER"
| where EventID in (18456, 18464, 18468, 18486, 18487, 18488)
| extend FailureReason = case(
    EventID == 18456, "Login failed (general)",
    EventID == 18464, "Login failed (password validation)",
    EventID == 18468, "Login failed (invalid token)",
    EventID == 18486, "Account locked out",
    EventID == 18487, "Password expired",
    EventID == 18488, "Password must change",
    "Unknown")
| extend LoginName = extract(@"Login failed for user '(.+?)'", 1, RenderedDescription)
| summarize Count = count() by Computer, FailureReason, LoginName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc, Count desc
content.title: 🔐 Login Failures (EventID 18456/18464/18468/18486-18488)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "MSSQLSERVER"
| where EventID in (18456, 18464, 18468, 18486, 18487, 18488)
| summarize LoginFailures = count() by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Login Failures per Hour (trend)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "MSSQLSERVER"
| where EventID in (1480, 19406)
| extend EventMeaning = case(
    EventID == 1480, "AG role change — primary/secondary handoff",
    EventID == 19406, "AG replica role changed",
    "AG event")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, EventMeaning, RenderedDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: 🔁 Availability Group Role Changes (EventID 1480 / 19406)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "SQLSERVERAGENT"
| where EventLevelName in ("Error", "Warning")
| extend EventMeaning = case(
    EventID in (103, 208, 312, 315, 317), "Agent cannot connect to SQL Server",
    "Agent error")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, EventLevelName, EventMeaning, RenderedDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: 🤖 SQL Agent Errors (connectivity & execution failures)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or "*" in ({Computer})
| where Source == "MSSQLSERVER"
| where EventLevelName in ("Error", "Critical")
| where EventID !in (18456, 18464, 18468, 18486, 18487, 18488, 823, 824, 825, 832, 833, 9001, 9002, 2570, 2601, 2627, 8928, 8929, 8930, 8964, 8965, 8966, 1480, 19406)
| summarize Count = count() by Computer, EventID
| order by Count desc
| take 30
content.title: 📊 Top SQL Server Errors by EventID (last period, excluding categorised above)

content.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where type =~ "microsoft.alertsmanagement/alerts"
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition == "Fired"
| where properties.essentials.alertRule contains "sql"
| project
    AlertName = tostring(properties.essentials.alertRule),
    Severity  = tostring(properties.essentials.severity),
    State     = tostring(properties.essentials.alertState),
    FiredTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.startDateTime),
    Target    = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResource)
| sort by FiredTime desc
| take 50
content.title: Active SQL Monitor Alerts
